_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox rapidly gaining traction in race for third Wild Card
items.snark: Sox cut the Wild Card gap from six games to four, and the traffic above them is finally thicker than a Fenway nacho line.

items.headline: Patriots set to play six nationally televised games in 2026 season
items.snark: Six primetime slots including a Super Bowl rematch Week 1, America gets to watch us lose under the lights again.
